company_type: Financial Services - Custody Bank and Asset Management

dependencies: Dependencies on third parties to access innovative technologies and develop new distribution channels
Complex strategic alliances and joint venture relationships for new products and services
Vendor relationships for outsourcing to global hub locations (India, Poland, China)
Subcustodian relationships in all jurisdictions except United States, Canada, Germany and United Kingdom
Dependencies on third-party service providers and technology infrastructure providers
risks: Third-party vendor failures or service disruptions
Vendor may not satisfy regulatory responsibilities regarding management and oversight
Attacks or constraints on financial, technology, infrastructure or government institutions

Subcustodian operational risk in emerging and underdeveloped markets
Third-party failures, terminations, errors or malfeasance
Concentration risk with subcustodians in certain markets
Outsourcing vendors or joint ventures may not comply with servicing and contractual obligations
